agents.name: Financial Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes revenue, cash flow, and profitability to assess repayment capability.

agents.name: Credit Risk Officer
agents.description: Analyzes debt ratios, credit scores, and existing obligations.

agents.name: Compliance Officer
agents.description: Uses RAG to ensure application matches lending policies and regulations.

agents.name: Committee Chairman
agents.description: Moderates the committee, detects conflicts, and drives consensus.
